metadata.description: End-to-end skills, commands and plugins for CloudiQS — AWS Advanced Consulting Partner. 59 skills, 40 commands, 8 plugins.

plugins.name: cloudiqus-commercial

plugins.name: cloudiqus-intelligence
plugins.description: Market intel — company research, sectors, competitors, buying signals.
